positive: A whimsical and deeply contrasting silhouette design featuring an astronaut floating among bioluminescent celestial flora and crystalline nebula fragments. The style is elegant modern tattoo art mixed with deep space etherealism. The astronaut should have a clean, classic helmet profile, and the flora should evoke delicate, illuminated glowing vines and glowing mushrooms. Composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a chest print. Use a restricted color palette of midnight blue, deep indigo, electric cyan, and glowing lime green accents, set against a stark black background. High contrast, clean lines, vector quality, minimalist yet detailed.
negative: blurry, watermark, signature, text, logos, low resolution, bad anatomy, artifacts, noisy, disfigured, extra limbs, solid colors, gradients, messy, photorealistic, painting, graffiti
